Legal.privacyMetaDescription: How PROVIN.LV processes personal data, cookies, and analytics after consent under GDPR.
Legal.privacyLead: This document describes how PROVIN.LV ("we", "service") processes personal data, what cookies are used, and how you can accept or reject non-essential analytics and first-touch (UTM) data storage.

sections.title: 1. Controller
sections.body: The data controller is PROVIN.LV; full legal details are provided at the start of this document. Contact details are listed in the website footer.

sections.title: 2. What data we process
sections.body: Order data may include name, email, phone, VIN, listing URL, free-form message and payment metadata (processed by Stripe according to its policy). Technical server logs may be used for security and stability.

sections.title: 3. Purposes and legal basis
sections.body: Contract performance and order processing; legitimate interests such as security and error prevention; analytics and UTM storage only after explicit consent.

Legal.termsMetaDescription: PROVIN.LV terms: service scope, payment, refund policy, distance contract and digital content withdrawal terms.
Legal.termsLead: These terms govern the legal relationship between you and PROVIN.LV for use of provin.lv and ordering paid consultation services.

termsSections.title: 1. Scope and acceptance
termsSections.body: By submitting an order and confirming these terms, the customer agrees to the full terms and immediate service execution.

termsSections.title: 2. Service nature
termsSections.body: PROVIN provides a consultative service and expert analysis; conclusions are advisory and do not replace technical inspection.

termsSections.title: 3. Data sources
termsSections.body: PROVIN uses multiple lawful data sources, including paid international databases and public registries, according to applicable terms and law.

termsSections.title: 4. Public registries
termsSections.body: Public registry data is used only in lawful ways and according to applicable regulations.

termsSections.title: 5. Orders, pricing, payment and refunds
termsSections.body: Pricing is shown at checkout; payment is processed by Stripe; refund rules for digital content are defined in section 11.

termsSections.title: 6. Delivery timelines
termsSections.body: The report is usually delivered within 48 hours after successful payment and complete order data.

termsSections.title: 7. Customer obligations
termsSections.body: Customers must provide accurate data and ensure they have rights to any provided third-party materials.

termsSections.title: 8. Intellectual property
termsSections.body: PROVIN report structure and content are protected; reuse is limited to personal use for purchase decision support.

termsSections.title: 9. Liability limitations
termsSections.body: PROVIN is not liable for incompleteness or errors in third-party data sources it does not control.

termsSections.title: 10. Personal data
termsSections.body: Personal data processing is governed by the Privacy Policy.

termsSections.title: 11. Digital content and withdrawal rights
termsSections.withdrawalIntro: **Withdrawal rights and refunds.** This section explains refund and withdrawal terms for digital content once service execution has started with user consent.

subsections.heading: 11.1. General rule
subsections.body: Withdrawal rights may apply under applicable law unless exceptions are triggered.

subsections.heading: 11.2. Digital content exception
subsections.body: By explicitly consenting to immediate execution and acknowledging withdrawal waiver, the customer loses withdrawal rights for digital content as allowed by law.

subsections.heading: 11.3. Other consumer rights
subsections.body: Other consumer rights remain applicable under law.

termsSections.title: 12. Dispute resolution
termsSections.body: Disputes are first handled amicably; unresolved matters may be handled under Latvian jurisdiction rules.

termsSections.title: 13. Changes to terms
termsSections.body: PROVIN may update these terms; the version active at order time applies unless law requires otherwise.

termsSections.title: 14. Applicable law
termsSections.body: These terms are governed by Latvian and directly applicable EU law.

termsSections.title: 15. Contacts
termsSections.body: Questions about these terms: use the email or WhatsApp listed in the website footer.

Cookies.bannerText: We use required cookies for website operation. If you consent, we also store anonymous first-touch and UTM data for traffic source analysis.
